prompt.description: Text prompt describing what image to generate. 1-2000 chars.

model.description: Always nano_banana_2 (Higgsfield's Nano Banana Pro job_set_type).

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the output image. Pick the closest to the target platform.

resolution.description: Output resolution. 4k costs 2x of 2k; 2k is the recommended default.

rules: DO NOT pass negativePrompt — Higgsfield's MCP tool doesn't accept it.
DO NOT pass styleIds / preset styles — not part of the nano_banana_2 schema.
DO NOT pass quality (gpt_image_2 only) or mode (veo / kling only).
Use --aspect_ratio, NOT --width/--height. The MCP tool resolves dimensions from the ratio.
Default aspect_ratio is '1:1' — for Instagram feed posts, prefer '4:5' or '1:1'.
Default resolution is '2k'. Use '1k' for drafts / previews, '4k' for final assets.
seed: optional fixed seed. Leave unset to let Higgsfield pick.
imageReference: when set, must be a publicly-accessible image URL. The MCP tool uploads to Higgsfield's storage server-side; we don't proxy the file ourselves.
Higgsfield credit cost: ~2 credits at 1k, ~4 at 2k, ~8 at 4k.
